description:
Retrieves a list of UniFi devices managed by hosts where the UI account making the API call is the owner or a super admin.

Note: The structure of the devices.uidb field may vary depending on the UniFi OS or Network Server version. The example provided is based on UniFi OS 4.1.13.

queryParameters.name: hostIds[]
queryParameters.description: List of host IDs to filter the results

queryParameters.name: time
queryParameters.description: Last processed timestamp of devices in RFC3339 format

queryParameters.name: pageSize
queryParameters.description: Number of items to return per page

queryParameters.name: nextToken
queryParameters.description: Token for pagination to retrieve the next set of results

fields.name: data
fields.description: Generic response data, specific schema depends on the endpoint

children.name: hostId
children.description: Unique identifier of the host device

children.name: hostName
children.description: Name of the host device

children.name: devices
children.description: Array of devices managed by this host

children.name: id
children.description: Unique identifier of the device

children.name: mac
children.description: MAC address of the device

children.name: name
children.description: User-defined name of the device

children.name: model
children.description: Model name of the device

children.name: shortname
children.description: Short identifier of the device model (e.g., UDMPROSE)

children.name: ip
children.description: IP address of the device

children.name: productLine
children.description: Product line of the device (network, protect, etc.)

children.name: status
children.description: Current connection status of the device (online, offline, etc.)

children.name: version
children.description: Current firmware version of the device

children.name: firmwareStatus
children.description: Status of device firmware (upToDate, updateAvailable, etc.)

children.name: updateAvailable
children.description: Version of firmware update available for the device, if any

children.name: isConsole
children.description: Indicates if the device is a console device

children.name: isManaged
children.description: Indicates if the device is managed by the controller

children.name: startupTime
children.description: Time when the device was last started in RFC3339 format

children.name: adoptionTime
children.description: Time when the device was adopted in RFC3339 format

children.name: note
children.description: User-defined notes for the device

children.name: uidb
children.description: UI-specific metadata including images and identifiers

children.name: updatedAt
children.description: Last update time in RFC3339 format

fields.name: nextToken
fields.description: Pagination token for fetching the next set of results

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/devices?hostIds%5B%5D=null&time=2025-10-30T01:52:51Z&pageSize=10&nextToken=602232A870250000000006C514FF00000000073DD8DB000000006369FDA2:1467082514", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
